title: No Item Pickup Animations
description: Simple client sided mod that removes pickup animations from items
body:
Just a simple client sided mod that removes pickup animations, works from versions **1.17-1.21.3**, as well as latest snapshots!


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V3TrhthHB2w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
